data.body: 4214 VALIDATED (Phase 4e). Held-out implementer (a9ef8ffa) implemented Option B: authorship.keys_valid_at_anchor + resolve_position_commit (shared era rule, no dup); opcert.verify_opcert anchors era at storage_anchor_commit S; verify_opcert.py resolves S from its own merged-log walk (fail-closed); trusted_env schema -> added_at_log_position/revoked_at_log_position (legacy main-SHA -> located error); new rebar trusted-env add|revoke CLI. My INDEPENDENT held-out rollback regression (test_opcert_rollback_heldout.py, implementer never saw it): revoked-key cert with backdated merged_log_commit + storage anchor S after revocation FAILS exit 1; control (not revoked) PASSES exit 0. TEETH: neutering revocation enforcement -> rollback test RED (bypass), control green; restored -> both green. Implementer's own suite: 47 passed, lint+typecheck clean. Running full CI pre-flight next.
